hero.title:

Architecture.
hero.subtitle: Expert Consultant in Secure Architectures & DevSecOps. Resilience by design. Operating as an elite standalone expert or orchestrating a team, I transform your complex challenges into fluid, documented, and bulletproof infrastructures.

about.title:
Belkacem
Raber.
about.subtitle: My hybrid profile combines Security, Systems, and Development. From technical consulting to large-scale infrastructure deployment, my goal is to ensure "security by design" at every stage of the project lifecycle.

biomes.title: What I build
biomes.1_desc: Development of robust backend architectures and integration of Deep Learning models (CNN/RNN). Creation of scalable digital ecosystems optimized for conversion and SEO.
biomes.2_desc: Network monitoring, intelligent threat detection, and incident response (Ransomware). Strategic guidance in ISO 27001 and GDPR governance.
biomes.3_desc: Design and deployment of highly available cloud (AWS, OVH) and on-premise architectures. Automation, containerization, and secure management (Cisco, Firewalls).

clip.title: TRUE POWER LIES IN THE UNSEEN.
clip.desc: Network layers, optimized algorithms, and ultra-high-performance databases constitute the true DNA of every solution I deliver.

projects.title:
Selected
Projects.
projects.subtitle: Every project is a mission: clear objectives, surgical execution, and measurable results.
projects.p1_desc: Advanced solution development using Deep Learning for threat detection over SDN networks.
projects.p2_desc: Design and deployment of secure cloud technical foundations for SMEs and critical infrastructures.
projects.p3_desc: Crisis management during major cyber attacks (Ransomwares). Service restoration and network securing.
projects.p4_desc: Creation of web platforms combining security (Hardening) with aggressive conversion rate optimization.
projects.p5_desc: Guiding companies in compliance with international standards and delivering architecture documents (DAT).
